items.en: In this section, we present our approach to post-training large models after the pre-training phase, enabling them to leverage the world knowledge acquired during pre-training to follow user instructions. During the supervised fine-tuning stage, we construct a diverse and comprehensive set of instructions to fully activate the capabilities of the LLMs, ensuring a strong foundational competence. To this end, following our previous work (Ding et al., 2023), we construct UltraChat v2, a large-scale SFT dataset covering abilities including knowledge application, reasoning, tool use, and long context processing.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们介绍了在预训练阶段之后对大型模型进行后训练的方法，使它们能够利用预训练期间获得的世界知识来遵循用户指令。在监督微调阶段，我们构建了一个多样且全面的指令集，以充分激活大语言模型的能力，确保强大的基础能力。为此，遵循我们之前的工作（Ding等人，2023），我们构建了UltraChat v2，这是一个大规模SFT数据集，涵盖知识应用、推理、工具使用和长上下文处理等能力。

items.en: Furthermore, to enhance the model’s deep reasoning ability, we employ supervised fine-tuning augmented with long chain-of-thought reasoning and integrate reinforcement learning techniques. The rollout process of RL usually suffers from the unbalanced load challenge, which can lead to very inefficient computations. To address this issue, we propose a load-balanced RL strategy – chunk-wise rollout.
items.zh: 此外，为了增强模型的深度推理能力，我们采用了增强长思维链推理的监督微调，并整合了强化学习技术。强化学习的推出过程通常面临负载不平衡的挑战，这可能导致非常低效的计算。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种负载均衡的强化学习策略——分块推出。

items.en: In the following paragraphs, we will provide details on supervised fine-tuning and reinforcement learning techniques used to enhance foundational capabilities and reasoning abilities.
items.zh: 在以下段落中，我们将提供用于增强基础能力和推理能力的监督微调和强化学习技术的详细信息。

full.sec: 3.1 UltraChat v2: Foundational Capability Enhanced SFT Data Generation
full.secZh: 3.1 UltraChat v2：增强基础能力的SFT数据生成

items.en: To improve LLMs’ core competencies, we design a synthetic data generation framework focused on task-oriented capabilities. Guided by key capability dimensions, the framework generates high-quality QA-style data covering a wide range of skills, providing more targeted and structured signals during post-training. We systematically develop synthetic data tracks across five key skill areas: knowledge applications, reasoning, instruction following, long-context processing, and tool use. Each track is tailored to the input-output patterns and cognitive demands of its target skill, providing diverse, task-driven, and transferable training examples. This approach helps the model improve consistently across key foundational capabilities.
items.zh: 为了提高大语言模型的核心能力，我们设计了一个专注于任务导向能力的合成数据生成框架。在关键能力维度的指导下，该框架生成涵盖广泛技能的高质量问答式数据，在后训练期间提供更有针对性和结构化的信号。我们系统地开发了五个关键技能领域的合成数据轨道：知识应用、推理、指令遵循、长上下文处理和工具使用。每个轨道都针对其目标技能的输入输出模式和认知需求进行定制，提供多样化、任务驱动和可迁移的训练示例。这种方法有助于模型在关键基础能力上持续改进。

items.en: We begin by extracting and organizing knowledge points from domain-specific corpora, exam syllabi, and textbook materials across various disciplines, thereby constructing a comprehensive and well-structured knowledge framework. Based on this framework, we leverage LLMs to generate practice question-answer pairs targeting individual knowledge points, thus forming the initial stage of a knowledge-driven QA dataset.
items.zh: 我们首先从各学科的专业语料库、考试大纲和教材材料中提取和组织知识点，从而构建一个全面且结构良好的知识框架。基于这个框架，我们利用大语言模型生成针对单个知识点的练习题问答对，从而形成知识驱动问答数据集的初始阶段。

items.en: To further enhance the diversity and generalization capability of the data, we apply two evolution strategies to the initial practice QA pairs: (1) Instruction evolution, which rewrites prompts in diverse ways to simulate various questioning styles and task formulations; and (2) Answer diversity evolution, which guides the model to generate plausible and stylistically varied answers, thereby improving the model’s robustness in knowledge understanding and expression.
items.zh: 为了进一步提高数据的多样性和泛化能力，我们对初始练习问答对应用了两种进化策略：（1）指令进化，以多种方式重写提示，模拟不同的提问风格和任务形式；（2）答案多样性进化，引导模型生成合理且风格多样的答案，从而提高模型在知识理解和表达方面的鲁棒性。

items.en: Reasoning ability is a fundamental skill that enables LLMs to manage complex tasks and generalize knowledge across diverse domains. Unlike standard question-answering tasks, reasoning tasks demand more than factual retrieval. They require models to perform multi-step logical inference and integrate information across contexts, while maintaining coherence and structural clarity in their responses. To improve LLMs’ abilities in mathematical reasoning, logical modeling, and procedural thinking, we develop two specialized datasets: one focused on mathematical reasoning, and the other on code-based reasoning. These datasets are designed to strengthen the model’s reasoning capacity and support the development of more robust and transferable logical skills.
items.zh: 推理能力是一项基本技能，使大语言模型能够管理复杂任务并在不同领域泛化知识。与标准问答任务不同，推理任务不仅需要事实检索。它们要求模型执行多步逻辑推理并在上下文之间整合信息，同时在响应中保持连贯性和结构清晰度。为了提高大语言模型在数学推理、逻辑建模和程序性思维方面的能力，我们开发了两个专门的数据集：一个专注于数学推理，另一个专注于基于代码的推理。这些数据集旨在增强模型的推理能力，并支持开发更稳健和可迁移的逻辑技能。

items.en: Math Reasoning Data We start by systematically categorizing mathematical knowledge across core domains, including linear algebra, calculus, probability, statistics, differential equations, discrete mathematics, and differential geometry. These topics are further organized by educational level—from elementary to university—to establish a clear hierarchy of difficulty. Based on these topics, we either use curated seed data or prompt LLMs directly to generate relevant questions. The model is then guided to produce both answers and self-reflections to improve logical consistency and correctness.
items.zh: 数学推理数据 我们首先系统地分类核心领域的数学知识，包括线性代数、微积分、概率论、统计学、微分方程、离散数学和微分几何。这些主题进一步按教育水平（从小学到大学）组织，以建立清晰的难度层次。基于这些主题，我们要么使用精心挑选的种子数据，要么直接提示大语言模型生成相关问题。然后引导模型生成答案和自我反思，以提高逻辑一致性和正确性。

items.en: In our methodology for generating math problems, we focus on two dimensions: instruction diversity and solution path variety. On the one hand, we extend basic problems into various formats—including multiple choice, fill-in-the-blank, and open-ended questions—to enhance both expressive diversity and structural complexity. On the other hand, we generate multiple valid solution paths for the same problem, thereby expanding the model’s ability to explore the reasoning space and generalize its problem-solving strategies. The generation process is guided by a set of heuristic rules, such as instruction adherence and response length control, to ensure mathematical validity and answer verifiability. This results in a math-focused data subset with both instructional value and reasoning depth. Additionally, we implement difficulty-based stratification, actively reducing the proportion of easy questions during training. This encourages the model to focus on medium-to-high-difficulty problems, effectively strengthening its ability to construct reasoning chains and handle complex logical structures.
items.zh: 在我们的数学问题生成方法中，我们关注两个维度：指令多样性和解题路径多样性。一方面，我们将基本问题扩展到各种格式——包括选择题、填空题和开放性问题——以增强表达多样性和结构复杂性。另一方面，我们为同一问题生成多个有效的解题路径，从而扩展模型探索推理空间和泛化问题解决策略的能力。生成过程由一组启发式规则指导，例如指令遵循和响应长度控制，以确保数学有效性和答案可验证性。这产生了一个具有教学价值和推理深度的数学聚焦数据子集。此外，我们实现了基于难度的分层，在训练期间主动减少简单问题的比例。这鼓励模型专注于中高难度问题，有效增强其构建推理链和处理复杂逻辑结构的能力。

items.en: Code Reasoning Data To enhance the code programming capabilities of LLMs, we design a code reasoning data generation pipeline tailored to real-world development scenarios. First, we manually define various coding contexts, problem categories (such as semantic completion, bug localization, and complex logic understanding), and difficulty levels to ensure that the constructed tasks closely resemble real-world engineering scenarios and have explicit reasoning objectives. In the data construction process, we extract high-quality code snippets, such as function definitions, algorithmic segments, and class structures, from authentic GitHub repositories, coding challenge libraries, or open-source scripts to serve as contextual foundations for question generation. Leveraging these predefined contexts and snippet structures, we employ LLMs to generate contextually relevant code reasoning problems. These problems encourage the model to comprehend program structure, simulate execution paths, and perform multi-step symbolic reasoning. Moreover, for each generated problem, we create accompanying unit tests and input-output examples to provide executable validation signals, ensuring that the model not only understands code semantics during training but also demonstrates behaviorally verifiable performance. Building on this foundation, we further diversify the problems by converting them into various formats, such as output prediction, logical diagnosis, and code rewriting, and by introducing cross-language translations (e.g., Python to Java, C++ to Rust) to enhance both contextual and logical diversity. This strategy not only broadens data coverage and generalization ability but also promotes the learning of unified reasoning patterns and program semantics across different syntactic structures and type systems. As a result, it strengthens the model’s cross-language transferability and adaptability to real-world development tasks.
items.zh: 代码推理数据 为了增强大语言模型的代码编程能力，我们设计了一个针对现实开发场景的代码推理数据生成流水线。首先，我们手动定义各种编码上下文、问题类别（如语义补全、错误定位和复杂逻辑理解）和难度级别，以确保构建的任务紧密模拟真实工程场景并具有明确的推理目标。在数据构建过程中，我们从真实的GitHub仓库、编程挑战库或开源脚本中提取高质量的代码片段，如函数定义、算法段和类结构，作为问题生成的上下文基础。利用这些预定义的上下文和片段结构，我们使用大语言模型生成上下文相关的代码推理问题。这些问题鼓励模型理解程序结构、模拟执行路径并执行多步符号推理。此外，对于每个生成的问题，我们创建配套的单元测试和输入输出示例，以提供可执行的验证信号，确保模型不仅在训练期间理解代码语义，而且表现出行为可验证的性能。在此基础上，我们通过将问题转换为各种格式（如输出预测、逻辑诊断和代码重写），并引入跨语言翻译（如Python到Java，C++到Rust），进一步多样化问题，以增强上下文和逻辑多样性。这种策略不仅拓宽了数据覆盖范围和泛化能力，而且促进了跨不同语法结构和类型系统的统一推理模式和程序语义的学习。因此，它增强了模型的跨语言迁移能力和对现实开发任务的适应性。

items.en: Progressive Construction of Complex Instructions We begin by generating simple base instructions and iteratively increase their complexity by layering additional requirements related to style, format, and content. This bottom-up strategy allows for a controlled progression from basic to more intricate tasks, enabling the model to better generalize across instruction complexities.
items.zh: 复杂指令的渐进式构建 我们首先生成简单的基指令，然后通过添加与风格、格式和内容相关的额外要求，迭代地增加其复杂性。这种自下而上的策略允许从基本任务到更复杂任务的可控进展，使模型能够更好地泛化跨指令复杂性的能力。

items.en: Result-Verifiable Instruction Generation We construct instructions with explicitly verifiable constraints, such as length limits, required content, or structural requirements. These constraints enable automatic validation of model outputs through rule-based filtering. By generating multiple outputs under varied decoding parameters, we can efficiently identify and retain only those responses that strictly satisfy the given conditions—thus supporting scalable and accurate data generation.
items.zh: 结果可验证的指令生成 我们构建具有明确可验证约束的指令，例如长度限制、所需内容或结构要求。这些约束通过基于规则的过滤实现模型输出的自动验证。通过在不同解码参数下生成多个输出，我们可以高效地识别并仅保留那些严格满足给定条件的响应——从而支持可扩展且准确的数据生成。

items.en: Enhancing Instruction Diversity To enrich the diversity of the instruction set, we incorporate prompts from a wide range of domains and contexts. Inspired by the approach proposed in Ge et al. (2024), we combine domain-specific knowledge with various persona settings to generate instructions that reflect a broader spectrum of real-world applications.
items.zh: 增强指令多样性 为了丰富指令集的多样性，我们融入了来自广泛领域和上下文的提示。受Ge等人（2024）提出的方法启发，我们将领域特定知识与各种角色设置相结合，生成反映更广泛现实世界应用场景的指令。

items.en: Reverse Instruction Generation from Existing Data Beyond generating instructions from scratch, we also employ a reverse instruction generation strategy—treating existing high-quality text as target outputs and generating corresponding instructions that could plausibly lead to them. This technique enables us to leverage valuable unlabeled corpora to augment instruction-following datasets.
items.zh: 从现有数据反向生成指令：除了从头生成指令外，我们还采用反向指令生成策略——将现有的高质量文本视为目标输出，并生成可能引导出这些文本的相应指令。该技术使我们能够利用有价值的未标注语料库来扩充指令遵循数据集。

items.en: Inspired by LongAlign (Bai et al., 2024), we construct long-context supervised fine-tuning data from existing pretraining corpora. We sample a document dd from various sources in the pretraining corpus, including web pages, source code, mathematical content, encyclopedic texts, etc. For each document dd, we use an LLM to generate a set of nn task-oriented queries Q=q1,q2,…,qnQ={q_{1},q_{2},\ldots,q_{n}}, covering a range of objectives such as extraction, summarization, reasoning, and open-domain question answering. To simulate long-context reasoning, we retrieve related but potentially irrelevant documents to form a challenging long-context input, simulating distractor-heavy settings. For each query qj∈Qq_{j}\in Q, we retrieve kk related documents dj,1,dj,2,…,dj,k{d_{j,1},d_{j,2},\ldots,d_{j,k}} from an indexed corpus. We then concatenate the original document dd with the retrieved documents to form an extended context Cj=Concat​(dj,1,…,dj,m−1,d,dj,m,…,dj,k)C_{j}=\text{Concat}(d_{j,1},\ldots,d_{j,m-1},d,d_{j,m},\ldots,d_{j,k}), where dd is inserted at a randomly selected position m∈1,2,…,k+1m\in{1,2,\ldots,k+1} within the sequence. An LLM is prompted with each query qjq_{j} alongside the context CjC_{j}, and tasked with generating an answer aja_{j}.
items.zh: 受LongAlign（Bai等人，2024）启发，我们从现有的预训练语料库中构建长上下文监督微调数据。我们从预训练语料库中的各种来源（包括网页、源代码、数学内容、百科全书文本等）采样一个文档d。对于每个文档d，我们使用一个LLM生成一组n个面向任务的查询Q={q1,q2,…,qn}，涵盖提取、摘要、推理和开放域问答等目标。为了模拟长上下文推理，我们检索相关但可能不相关的文档，形成一个具有挑战性的长上下文输入，模拟干扰项密集的场景。对于每个查询qj∈Q，我们从索引语料库中检索k个相关文档dj,1,dj,2,…,dj,k。然后，我们将原始文档d与检索到的文档拼接，形成扩展上下文Cj=Concat(dj,1,…,dj,m-1,d,dj,m,…,dj,k)，其中d被插入到序列中随机选择的位置m∈{1,2,…,k+1}。使用每个查询qj和上下文Cj提示一个LLM，并让其生成答案aj。

items.en: This design helps the model learn to locate relevant content and perform reasoning across long inputs with mixed relevance. To ensure coverage across different context lengths, we control the total token count of CjC_{j} to be uniformly distributed between 8K and 64K tokens.
items.zh: 这种设计帮助模型学习定位相关内容并在混合相关性的长输入中进行推理。为了确保覆盖不同的上下文长度，我们将Cj的总token数控制在8K到64K token之间均匀分布。

items.en: Function Calling The function calling dataset combines publicly available sources such as xlam-function-calling-60k (Liu et al., 2024c) and glaive-function-calling-v2 333https://huggingface.co/datasets/glaiveai/glaive-function-calling-v2, with a substantial amount of in-house data generated via in-context learning. To ensure data quality, we apply strict filtering criteria. Specifically, we remove samples where the tool invoked in the ground truth is not included in the available tool set, or where the parameter names or types are inconsistent with the tool schema. Additionally, we prepend a chain-of-thought reasoning step before the tool invocation. Empirically, we find that this improves model performance by guiding it to better understand the task and select appropriate tools and arguments.
items.zh: 函数调用：函数调用数据集结合了公开可用的来源，如xlam-function-calling-60k（Liu等人，2024c）和glaive-function-calling-v2（https://huggingface.co/datasets/glaiveai/glaive-function-calling-v2），以及通过上下文学习生成的大量内部数据。为确保数据质量，我们应用严格的过滤标准。具体来说，我们移除那些真实答案中调用的工具不在可用工具集中，或参数名称或类型与工具模式不一致的样本。此外，我们在工具调用之前添加一个思维链推理步骤。经验上，我们发现这通过引导模型更好地理解任务并选择合适的工具和参数来提升模型性能。

items.en: Code Interpreter To enhance the model’s ability in code generation and reasoning, we construct a collection of data examples focused on solving problems with the help of a code interpreter. This includes both curated open-source datasets and internal data designed to reflect real-world coding scenarios.
items.zh: 代码解释器：为了增强模型在代码生成和推理方面的能力，我们构建了一系列数据示例，专注于借助代码解释器解决问题。这包括精选的开源数据集和旨在反映真实编码场景的内部数据。

items.en: For open-source datasets, we utilize resources such as CodeAct (Wang et al., 2024b) and Code-Feedback (Zheng et al., 2024). To ensure compatibility with our execution environment, we preprocess the data by analyzing the abstract syntax tree (AST) of each code snippet and filtering out those that import external packages or rely on user interaction.
items.zh: 对于开源数据集，我们利用CodeAct（Wang等人，2024b）和Code-Feedback（Zheng等人，2024）等资源。为确保与我们的执行环境兼容，我们通过分析每个代码片段的抽象语法树（AST）进行预处理，并过滤掉那些导入外部包或依赖用户交互的代码片段。

items.en: For in-house data, we collect various types of files, including CSVs, PDFs, images, and videos, and prompt an LLM to generate realistic, code-solvable problems related to the content of each file. Then the model is prompted to solve the task using a code interpreter, and is allowed to iteratively generate and execute code in a sandboxed environment. After each execution, the result is fed back to the model. If the model fails to solve the problem within 10 attempts, the data point is discarded. This approach helps create feedback-driven examples that teach the model how to use code to solve real-world tasks more effectively.
items.zh: 对于内部数据，我们收集各种类型的文件，包括CSV、PDF、图像和视频，并提示一个LLM生成与每个文件内容相关的、可编码解决的现实问题。然后，模型被提示使用代码解释器解决问题，并允许在沙盒环境中迭代生成和执行代码。每次执行后，结果反馈给模型。如果模型在10次尝试内未能解决问题，则丢弃该数据点。这种方法有助于创建反馈驱动的示例，教导模型如何更有效地使用代码解决现实任务。

full.sec: 3.2 Chunk-wise Rollout: Deep Reasoning with Load-Balanced Reinforcement Learning
full.secZh: 3.2 分块展开：负载均衡强化学习实现深度推理

items.en: Recent research has demonstrated that RL can enhance the deep reasoning capabilities of LLMs (OpenAI, 2024b; DeepSeek et al., 2025). However, directly applying RL to an end-side base model often leads to unstable training and slow convergence. Thus, we first perform SFT on the base model using long-CoT distilled data. This step equips the model with basic reasoning abilities and provides a better initialization for RL. Subsequently, we proceed with RL to further enhance the model’s performance. To improve training efficiency, we carefully curate the training data and introduce a chunk-wise rollout strategy, which significantly accelerates the RL process by optimizing GPU utilization and minimizing computational waste.
items.zh: 最近的研究表明，强化学习可以增强LLM的深度推理能力（OpenAI，2024b；DeepSeek等人，2025）。然而，直接将强化学习应用于端侧基础模型往往导致训练不稳定和收敛缓慢。因此，我们首先使用长思维链蒸馏数据对基础模型进行SFT。这一步使模型具备基本推理能力，并为强化学习提供更好的初始化。随后，我们进行强化学习以进一步提升模型性能。为提高训练效率，我们精心策划训练数据并引入分块展开策略，通过优化GPU利用率和最小化计算浪费，显著加速强化学习过程。

items.en: We collect a large amount of high-quality data in mathematics and programming to enhance the model’s reasoning ability. We found that the quality and difficulty of the data play an important role in improving the model’s reasoning capabilities.
items.zh: 我们收集了大量高质量的数学和编程数据，以增强模型的推理能力。我们发现数据的质量和难度在提升模型推理能力方面起着重要作用。

items.en: Mathematics We collect verifiable mathematical data primarily from DAPO, Deepscaler, Numina, Prime, and other sources. During the evaluation phase, outputs that do not conform to the expected reasoning format are assigned a reward of zero. To determine correctness, we employ a combination of rule-based matching and symbolic verification using SymPy.
items.zh: 数学：我们主要从DAPO、Deepscaler、Numina、Prime等来源收集可验证的数学数据。在评估阶段，不符合预期推理格式的输出被赋予零奖励。为确定正确性，我们结合基于规则的匹配和使用SymPy的符号验证。

items.en: Code The code-related data is mainly sourced from LeetCode, TACO, Kodcode, Codeforces, and similar platforms. We execute Python code within a Firejail sandbox environment444https://github.com/netblue30/firejail. For problems with multiple test cases, the reward is calculated based on the proportion of test cases passed, with a full reward of 1.0 assigned when all test cases pass.
items.zh: 代码：代码相关数据主要来自LeetCode、TACO、Kodcode、Codeforces等平台。我们在Firejail沙盒环境（https://github.com/netblue30/firejail）中执行Python代码。对于有多个测试用例的问题，奖励根据通过的测试用例比例计算，当所有测试用例通过时获得1.0的完全奖励。

items.en: Data Filtering After data collection, we perform deduplication on both the reinforcement learning (RL) training data and the supervised fine-tuning (SFT) data using Semhash (van Dongen & Tulkens, 2025). To retain more challenging samples, we use DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B to generate four predictions for each training example and filter out those for which all four predictions are correct. Since the amount of code data is significantly smaller than the math data, we upsample high-quality code samples multiple times to increase their proportion in the training set.
items.zh: 数据过滤：数据收集后，我们使用Semhash（van Dongen & Tulkens, 2025）对强化学习训练数据和监督微调数据进行去重。为保留更具挑战性的样本，我们使用DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B为每个训练示例生成四个预测，并过滤掉所有四个预测都正确的样本。由于代码数据量明显小于数学数据，我们对高质量代码样本进行多次上采样，以增加其在训练集中的比例。

items.en: Building upon recent advancements in the research community, we adopt a modified version of Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) (Shao et al., 2024b). In addition to the original GRPO algorithm, we incorporate the following improvements:
items.zh: 基于研究社区的最新进展，我们采用了一种改进版本的组相对策略优化（GRPO）（Shao等人，2024b）。除了原始GRPO算法外，我们加入了以下改进：

items.en: Dynamic Sampling During the RL rollout phase, we filter out prompts whose responses are all right or wrong, ensuring that all prompts in the batch contribute effective gradients while maintaining a consistent batch size. This strategy mitigates high variance in the gradient, thereby improving training efficiency and stability.
items.zh: 动态采样：在强化学习展开阶段，我们过滤掉那些响应全部正确或全部错误的提示，确保批次中的所有提示都贡献有效梯度，同时保持一致的批次大小。该策略减轻了梯度的高方差，从而提高了训练效率和稳定性。

items.en: Clip-Higher Strategy We raise the upper clipping threshold for the importance sampling ratio. This adjustment alleviates entropy collapse in later training stages and encourages greater exploration, helping the model realize its full potential.
items.zh: 更高裁剪策略：我们提高了重要性采样比率的上限裁剪阈值。这一调整缓解了训练后期的熵崩溃，并鼓励更多探索，帮助模型发挥其全部潜力。

items.en: Token-level Policy Gradient Loss Instead of averaging loss at the sample level, we compute the loss at the token level. This gives longer sequences a proportionally greater weight in the gradient update, which promotes the model to learn complex reasoning patterns and suppresses undesirable behaviors such as verbosity and repetition, ultimately improving training stability and generation quality.
items.zh: Token级策略梯度损失：我们不在样本级别平均损失，而是在token级别计算损失。这使较长的序列在梯度更新中获得比例上更大的权重，促进模型学习复杂推理模式，并抑制诸如冗长和重复等不良行为，最终提高训练稳定性和生成质量。

items.en: Overlong Sample Filtering We exclude responses that are truncated due to length constraints from the loss computation. This prevents penalizing valid reasoning trajectories that are prematurely cut off, thereby encouraging the model to engage in deeper reasoning.
items.zh: 过长样本过滤：我们从损失计算中排除因长度限制而被截断的响应。这防止了对过早截断的有效推理轨迹的惩罚，从而鼓励模型进行更深入的推理。

items.en: To mitigate inference throughput degradation caused by lengthy trajectories during the rollout phase, we propose a chunk-wise rollout strategy to maximize computational resource utilization. The workflow of this strategy consists of three steps: (1) The policy model generates trajectories of a fixed chunk length for all input samples. (2) Trajectories that are either fully completed or have reached the maximum generation length are used for training. For the incomplete ones, their log probabilities are computed and stored for later use in importance sampling. (3)The unfinished trajectories are merged with the next batch of new inputs, then the process returns to step (1). By adopting this strategy, we significantly improve GPU utilization and effectively reduce computational waste caused by excessively long outputs within a single rollout iteration. The full algorithm can be found in Algorithm 1
items.zh: 为了缓解展开阶段因长轨迹导致的推理吞吐量下降，我们提出了一种分块展开策略，以最大化计算资源利用率。该策略的工作流程包括三个步骤：（1）策略模型为所有输入样本生成固定块长度的轨迹。（2）完全完成或达到最大生成长度的轨迹用于训练。对于未完成的轨迹，计算其对数概率并存储以备后续重要性采样使用。（3）未完成的轨迹与下一批新输入合并，然后返回步骤（1）。通过采用这一策略，我们显著提高了GPU利用率，并有效减少了单次展开迭代中因过长输出导致的计算浪费。完整算法见算法1。

items.en: Since the chunk-wise rollout strategy breaks down long responses into smaller chunks across iterations, this may lead to distributional shifts in partially sampled trajectories after the policy model is updated, which can compromise training stability. To address this challenge and ensure a more stable training process, we introduce the following techniques:
items.zh: 由于分块展开策略将长响应分解为跨迭代的较小块，这可能导致策略模型更新后部分采样轨迹的分布偏移，从而影响训练稳定性。为解决这一挑战并确保更稳定的训练过程，我们引入了以下技术：

items.en: Chunk-level importance sampling As trajectories generated through the chunk-wise rollout strategy span multiple policy model versions, we apply importance sampling at the chunk level to account for distributional differences. Each chunk is weighted independently based on its originating policy. We found this technique to be critical for maintaining stable and efficient policy optimization.
items.zh: 块级重要性采样：由于通过分块展开策略生成的轨迹跨越多个策略模型版本，我们在块级应用重要性采样以考虑分布差异。每个块根据其来源策略独立加权。我们发现该技术对于维持稳定高效的政策优化至关重要。

items.en: Dual-clip The chunk-wise strategy introduces partial off-policy rollouts, which often lead to spikes in training loss due to high variance in sampled trajectories. To mitigate this, we incorporate dual-clip (Ye et al., 2020), which constrains the policy update range from both directions, effectively reducing instability caused by large discrepancies in trajectory distributions.
items.zh: 双裁剪 分块策略引入了部分离策略展开，这通常由于采样轨迹的高方差而导致训练损失出现尖峰。为了缓解这一问题，我们采用了双裁剪（Ye等人，2020），它从两个方向约束策略更新范围，有效减少了由轨迹分布巨大差异引起的不稳定性。

items.en: KL regularization with dynamic reference updates In contrast to recent works that remove KL loss (Yu et al., 2025a; Xia et al., 2025), we observe that retaining the KL penalty is essential for the stable training of chunk-wise rollouts. To avoid overly restricting the policy model’s potential, we periodically update the reference model, striking a balance between training stability and model performance.
items.zh: 带动态参考更新的KL正则化 与最近移除KL损失的工作（Yu等人，2025a；Xia等人，2025）相反，我们观察到保留KL惩罚对于分块展开的稳定训练至关重要。为了避免过度限制策略模型的潜力，我们定期更新参考模型，在训练稳定性和模型性能之间取得平衡。

items.en: Garble filter Since the chunk-wise rollout strategy reuses incomplete trajectories from previous policy models, the risk of generating corrupted or incoherent text (e.g., garbled output, excessive repetition) increases. To prevent these abnormal trajectories from destabilizing training, we introduce a garble filter that detects and excludes such samples from loss computation.
items.zh: 乱码过滤器 由于分块展开策略重用先前策略模型的不完整轨迹，生成损坏或不连贯文本（例如乱码输出、过度重复）的风险增加。为了防止这些异常轨迹破坏训练稳定性，我们引入了一个乱码过滤器，用于检测此类样本并将其从损失计算中排除。

items.en: Based on the aforementioned techniques, for each specific question-answer pair (q,a)(q,a), the behavior policy πθold\pi_{\theta_{\text{old}}} samples a group of GG individual responses {oi}i=1G\{o_{i}\}_{i=1}^{G}, we reformulate the original policy optimization objective to support our proposed chunk-wise rollout. The modified objective is formally defined as follows:
items.zh: 基于上述技术，对于每个特定的问答对$(q,a)$，行为策略$\pi_{\theta_{\text{old}}}$采样一组$G$个独立响应$\{o_i\}_{i=1}^G$，我们将原始策略优化目标重新表述以支持我们提出的分块展开。修改后的目标正式定义如下：

items.en: We train DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B on the DAPO dataset for 150 steps to evaluate our proposed chunk-wise rollout strategy. The experiments are conducted on 64 A800 GPUs, using a batch size of 64 and a learning rate of 3×10−63\times 10^{-6}. During training, we set the number of rollouts per sample to 8. For evaluation, we report the average performance over 16 independent runs. The results are presented in Table 2. "Naive" refers to generating a full response for each query during the rollout phase; "Chunk-nk" denotes our chunk-wise rollout strategy, which generates up to nk tokens per input during each rollout. The metrics "step" and "sampling" represent the average time per training step and the average time spent sampling trajectories per step, respectively. All timing values are normalized with respect to the naive dynamic sampling baseline.
items.zh: 我们在DAPO数据集上训练DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B共150步，以评估我们提出的分块展开策略。实验在64块A800 GPU上进行，批大小为64，学习率为$3\times 10^{-6}$。训练期间，每个样本的展开次数设置为8。评估时，我们报告16次独立运行的平均性能。结果如表2所示。“Naive”指在展开阶段为每个查询生成完整响应；“Chunk-nk”表示我们的分块展开策略，每次展开每个输入最多生成nk个token。指标“step”和“sampling”分别表示每步平均训练时间和每步平均采样轨迹时间。所有时间值均相对于朴素动态采样基线进行了归一化。

items.en: From the experimental results, we can observe that the chunk-wise rollout strategy effectively reduces both training and sampling time per step while maintaining performance. As the chunk size decreases, the sampling time per step steadily declines, confirming that this strategy mitigates long trajectory-induced bubbles during sampling and improves GPU utilization. However, when the chunk size is reduced from 8k to 4k, although the sampling time per step is obviously reduced, the total training time per step remains largely unchanged. This is because the smaller chunk size, while alleviating sampling bottlenecks, introduces more frequent log probability computations for chunk-level importance sampling. As a result, the overall training efficiency sees little improvement. In future work, we will further optimize this trade-off to achieve a better balance between sampling speed and log probability calculation.
items.zh: 从实验结果可以看出，分块展开策略有效减少了每步的训练和采样时间，同时保持了性能。随着块大小的减小，每步采样时间稳步下降，证实了该策略缓解了采样过程中长轨迹引起的气泡问题，并提高了GPU利用率。然而，当块大小从8k减少到4k时，尽管每步采样时间明显减少，但每步总训练时间基本保持不变。这是因为较小的块大小虽然缓解了采样瓶颈，但引入了更频繁的块级重要性采样的对数概率计算。因此，整体训练效率提升不大。在未来的工作中，我们将进一步优化这一权衡，以在采样速度和对数概率计算之间取得更好的平衡。

items.en: We set the training batch size to 256 and the mini-batch size to 128. A constant learning rate of 1​e−51e-5 is used throughout training. To accommodate the architectural design of \modelname, we adopt the μ\muP learning rate strategy. Unlike recent approaches that remove the KL penalty and introduce an entropy constraint in the policy loss, we retain the KL penalty with a coefficient of 0.001 and remove the entropy constraint to ensure stable training. The maximum response length is set to 32,768 tokens, which enables the model to perform extended chain-of-thought reasoning. During the rollout phase, both the temperature and top-p are set to 1.0 to encourage broader exploration. For each query, we generate 16 rollouts to promote diversity and robustness.
items.zh: 我们将训练批大小设置为256，小批大小设置为128。整个训练过程中使用恒定的学习率$1e-5$。为了适应\modelname的架构设计，我们采用了$\mu$P学习率策略。与最近移除KL惩罚并在策略损失中引入熵约束的方法不同，我们保留KL惩罚，系数为0.001，并移除熵约束以确保稳定训练。最大响应长度设置为32,768个token，使模型能够进行扩展的思维链推理。在展开阶段，温度和top-p均设置为1.0，以鼓励更广泛的探索。对于每个查询，我们生成16个展开以促进多样性和鲁棒性。

full.sec: 3.3 BitCPM4: Quantization-Aware Training for Ternary LLMs
full.secZh: 3.3 BitCPM4：三元大模型量化感知训练

items.en: Deploying LLMs is challenging due to their high computational and memory demands. Model quantization addresses this challenge by lowering parameter precision, leading to efficient inference with reduced resource consumption. Extremely low-bit quantization (e.g., 1-bit, 2-bit) has recently garnered significant interest and shows great promise (Wang et al., 2023; Ma et al., 2024; Xu et al., ). However, to build these extremely low-bit LLMs, PTQ methods (Frantar et al., 2023) may not be sufficient to maintain the model performance, necessitating more effective QAT methods (Liu et al., 2024b). Some recent efforts, such as BitNet (Ma et al., 2025), even train extremely low-bit LLMs from scratch. This paper introduces an efficient QAT method to construct an effective ternary model BitCPM4, and demonstrates the feasibility of adapting high-precision LLMs to extremely low-bit versions. This means that we can greatly reduce the additional overhead caused by quantization and dequantization during QAT.
items.zh: 部署LLM具有挑战性，因为其计算和内存需求高。模型量化通过降低参数精度来解决这一挑战，从而在减少资源消耗的情况下实现高效推理。极低位量化（例如1位、2位）最近引起了广泛关注，并显示出巨大潜力（Wang等人，2023；Ma等人，2024；Xu等人，）。然而，为了构建这些极低位LLM，PTQ方法（Frantar等人，2023）可能不足以维持模型性能，因此需要更有效的QAT方法（Liu等人，2024b）。最近的一些工作，如BitNet（Ma等人，2025），甚至从头开始训练极低位LLM。本文介绍了一种高效的QAT方法，用于构建有效的三值模型BitCPM4，并展示了将高精度LLM适配为极低位版本的可行性。这意味着我们可以大大减少QAT过程中由量化和反量化引起的额外开销。

items.en: For prevailing quantization methods, both weights and activations are typically quantized. Our preliminary experiments indicate that for extremely low-bit quantized LLMs, quantizing activations increases the QAT overhead without reducing too much inference costs on end-side devices. Consequently, we apply ternary quantization to model weights rather than activations. The current state-of-the-art ternary LLM, BitNet-2B (Ma et al., 2025), is trained from scratch using QAT on 4T tokens and achieves impressive performance. In contrast, our strategy involves initializing the ternary model with a pre-trained high-precision checkpoint to reduce the required training tokens for QAT.
items.zh: 对于主流量化方法，权重和激活通常都被量化。我们的初步实验表明，对于极低位量化LLM，量化激活会增加QAT开销，而不会在终端设备上减少太多推理成本。因此，我们对模型权重而非激活应用三值量化。当前最先进的三值LLM BitNet-2B（Ma等人，2025）使用QAT在4T token上从头训练，并取得了令人印象深刻的性能。相比之下，我们的策略是用预训练的高精度检查点初始化三值模型，以减少QAT所需的训练token。

items.en: To validate the feasibility of applying QAT to a model initialized from a high-precision checkpoint, we first conduct preliminary experiments on a 5M-parameter model in our ModelTunnel, using a total of 2B (400N) tokens. For these experiments, we employ the whole WSD learning rate scheduler, where the combined warm-up and stable phases account for 80% of the total tokens, and the decay phase accounts for the remaining 20%. These preliminary experiments involve two training stages: initially training an FP8 model, and then converting this FP8 model to a ternary model through QAT. Sufficient experiments in our ModelTunnel show that the re-warmup of the learning rate at the beginning of the second stage is critical for maintaining the performance of the FP8 model. To this end, we employ a learning rate of 1e-2 in the first stage, while in the second stage, we use a learning rate of 5e-3. While keeping the total number of training tokens constant, we adjust the allocation ratio between the FP8 training stage and the QAT stage, and record the final converged loss for each configuration.
items.zh: 为了验证将QAT应用于从高精度检查点初始化的模型的可行性，我们首先在ModelTunnel中对一个5M参数的模型进行了初步实验，总共使用了2B（400N）个token。在这些实验中，我们采用了完整的WSD学习率调度器，其中预热和稳定阶段合计占总token的80%，衰减阶段占剩余的20%。这些初步实验涉及两个训练阶段：首先训练一个FP8模型，然后通过QAT将该FP8模型转换为三值模型。在ModelTunnel中的充分实验表明，第二阶段开始时学习率的重新预热对于保持FP8模型的性能至关重要。为此，我们在第一阶段使用学习率1e-2，而在第二阶段使用学习率5e-3。在保持总训练token数不变的情况下，我们调整FP8训练阶段和QAT阶段之间的分配比例，并记录每种配置的最终收敛损失。

items.en: As shown in Figure 5, when the proportion of tokens dedicated to QAT exceeds 40% of the total training tokens, i.e., equivalent to twice the number of tokens used in the learning rate decay phase, the final loss closely approaches that of training the ternary model from scratch via QAT. Furthermore, we conduct verification experiments on a 150M-parameter model, and the results confirm that reasonable continual-training scheduling can achieve the same effect as performing QAT from scratch to get effective ternary models. To this end, we build BitCPM4 using only twice the number of tokens used in the learning rate decay phase.
items.zh: 如图5所示，当QAT专用的token比例超过总训练token的40%时，即相当于学习率衰减阶段所用token数量的两倍，最终损失非常接近通过QAT从头训练三值模型的结果。此外，我们在一个150M参数的模型上进行了验证实验，结果证实合理的持续训练调度可以达到与从头进行QAT相同的效果，从而获得有效的三值模型。为此，我们仅使用学习率衰减阶段所用token数量的两倍来构建BitCPM4。

items.en: We finally train two sizes of ternary models: one is BitCPM4-0.5B trained based on \modelname-0.5B, and the other 1B-parameter model is trained based on the internal experimental model. The whole QAT process uses 350B tokens.
items.zh: 我们最终训练了两个规模的三值模型：一个是基于\modelname-0.5B训练的BitCPM4-0.5B，另一个1B参数模型基于内部实验模型训练。整个QAT过程使用了350B个token。

items.en: We compare our models with those of other related models, and the results are shown in Table 3. At the 0.5B-parameter level, BitCPM4-0.5B outperforms qwen3-0.6B on knowledge-related tasks (MMLU, CMMLU, C-EVAL, etc). At the 1B-parameter level, BitCPM4-1B performs similarly to competing 2B-parameter models. As the number of tokens required for BitCPM4 is only 10% of that for BitNet-2B, this means that implementing QAT from scratch is not necessary, and further shows that our proposed QAT method can deliver competitive results while requiring less training costs.
items.zh: 我们将我们的模型与其他相关模型进行了比较，结果如表3所示。在0.5B参数级别，BitCPM4-0.5B在知识相关任务（MMLU、CMMLU、C-EVAL等）上优于qwen3-0.6B。在1B参数级别，BitCPM4-1B的性能与竞争的2B参数模型相似。由于BitCPM4所需的token数量仅为BitNet-2B的10%，这意味着从头实施QAT并非必要，并进一步表明我们提出的QAT方法能够在降低训练成本的同时提供有竞争力的结果。

items.en: However, our 0.5B-parameter model exhibits relatively weaker performance on more challenging mathematical and coding tasks, which we attribute to that smaller model size restricts reasoning capabilities. Existing quantization efforts suggest that the quantization effectiveness follows a scaling law related to the model size (Ouyang et al., 2024; Kumar et al., 2024). Based on this law, we plan to apply our QAT method to larger models in our future work. Moreover, the operators for extremely low-bit models are also an issue that needs to be fully considered, and this will also be our future work.
items.zh: 然而，我们的0.5B参数模型在更具挑战性的数学和编码任务上表现相对较弱，我们将其归因于较小的模型规模限制了推理能力。现有的量化工作表明，量化效果遵循与模型规模相关的缩放定律（Ouyang等人，2024；Kumar等人，2024）。基于这一定律，我们计划在未来的工作中将我们的QAT方法应用于更大的模型。此外，极低位模型的操作符也是一个需要充分考虑的问题，这也将是我们未来的工作。

items.en: Due to strict constraints on compute, storage capacity, and power consumption of end-side devices such as mobile devices and personal computers, how to achieve efficient inference of LLMs under limited hardware resources has become a key technical challenge. In this section, we will introduce our inference system, CPM.cu, and deployment system, ArkInfer.
items.zh: 由于移动设备和个人电脑等终端设备在算力、存储容量和功耗方面受到严格限制，如何在有限硬件资源下实现LLM的高效推理已成为一个关键技术挑战。在本节中，我们将介绍我们的推理系统CPM.cu和部署系统ArkInfer。

full.sec: 4.1 CPM.cu: Lightweight and Efficient CUDA Inference Framework

items.en: We first develop a lightweight inference framework optimized for end-side NVIDIA chips. Beyond the basic features, such as static memory management and kernel fusion, we implement a highly efficient speculative sampling and integrate efficient sparse attention kernels for InfLLM v2. Speculative sampling is a critical technique for accelerating LLM inference (Leviathan et al., 2023; Chen et al., 2023; Cai et al., 2024; Li et al., 2024c), particularly in resource-constrained end-side devices. This approach employs a draft-then-verify paradigm where a lightweight draft model generates candidate token sequences, which are subsequently verified by the target LLM in parallel. The recent advances in speculative sampling, such as EAGLE-2 (Li et al., 2024c), utilize a tree-style drafting process. By designing efficient attention kernels tailored for tree-based speculative sampling and implementing fused verification kernels, we achieve an optimized speculative sampling speed. We also implement an efficient InfLLM v2 sparse attention kernel within the framework.
items.zh: 我们首先开发了一个针对终端NVIDIA芯片优化的轻量级推理框架。除了静态内存管理和内核融合等基本功能外，我们还实现了高效的推测采样，并为InfLLM v2集成了高效的稀疏注意力内核。推测采样是加速LLM推理的关键技术（Leviathan等人，2023；Chen等人，2023；Cai等人，2024；Li等人，2024c），特别是在资源受限的终端设备上。该方法采用草稿-验证范式，其中轻量级草稿模型生成候选token序列，随后由目标LLM并行验证。推测采样的最新进展，如EAGLE-2（Li等人，2024c），利用了树形草稿过程。通过设计针对树形推测采样的高效注意力内核并实现融合验证内核，我们实现了优化的推测采样速度。我们还在该框架内实现了一个高效的InfLLM v2稀疏注意力内核。

items.en: Based on the framework, we identify that the efficiency bottleneck in speculative sampling for end-side models lies in the language modeling head of the draft model. To address this, we propose FR-Spec (Zhao et al., 2025), which prunes the draft model’s vocabulary based on the token frequency while preserving the full vocabulary of the target model to maintain its generation quality. We further explore combining speculative sampling with 4-bit quantized GPTQ (Frantar et al., 2023) models. To maintain model performance, we first explore an improved quantization scheme, P-GPTQ, and subsequently validate the feasibility of integrating speculative sampling with quantization in SpecMQuant (Zhang et al., 2025b) and with long-context processing.
items.zh: 基于该框架，我们发现终端模型推测采样的效率瓶颈在于草稿模型的语言建模头。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了FR-Spec（Zhao等人，2025），它根据token频率修剪草稿模型的词汇表，同时保留目标模型的完整词汇表以保持其生成质量。我们进一步探索了将推测采样与4位量化GPTQ（Frantar等人，2023）模型相结合。为了保持模型性能，我们首先探索了一种改进的量化方案P-GPTQ，随后在SpecMQuant（Zhang等人，2025b）中验证了将推测采样与量化以及长上下文处理相结合的可行性。

items.en: The effectiveness of speculative sampling relies heavily on the efficiency of both the drafting and verification phases. Recent advances such as EAGLE-2 (Li et al., 2024c) have made remarkable progress in reducing drafting overhead through extremely lightweight architectures, by employing single-layer Transformers for the drafting process. Contemporary models tend to adopt larger vocabularies to improve tokenization efficiency, introducing significant computational overhead in the language modeling head, making the drafting process slow, although it has only a single layer. Our investigation reveals that the transition from small to large vocabulary models substantially increases drafting time, creating a new performance bottleneck that limits the effectiveness of speculative sampling techniques.
items.zh: 推测采样的有效性在很大程度上取决于草稿和验证阶段的效率。最近的进展如EAGLE-2（Li等人，2024c）通过采用单层Transformer进行草稿过程，在降低草稿开销方面取得了显著进展。当代模型倾向于采用更大的词汇表以提高分词效率，这在语言建模头中引入了显著的计算开销，使得草稿过程变慢，尽管它只有一层。我们的研究表明，从小词汇表模型到大词汇表模型的转变显著增加了草稿时间，产生了新的性能瓶颈，限制了推测采样技术的有效性。

items.en: To address this challenge, we introduce FR-Spec (Zhao et al., 2025), a frequency-ranked speculative sampling framework that optimizes draft candidate selection through strategic vocabulary space compression. Our approach leverages the well-documented long-tail distribution of token frequencies in natural language, where a small subset of high-frequency tokens accounts for the majority of occurrences. By restricting the draft search to a frequency-prioritized subset of tokens, FR-Spec reduces the computational overhead of the language modeling head by up to 75%75\% while maintaining the mathematical equivalence of the verification process and preserving the correctness of the final output distribution.
items.zh: 为了应对这一挑战，我们引入了FR-Spec（Zhao等人，2025），一种频率排序的推测采样框架，通过策略性的词汇空间压缩来优化草稿候选选择。我们的方法利用了自然语言中token频率的已知长尾分布，其中一小部分高频token占据了大多数出现次数。通过将草稿搜索限制在频率优先的token子集上，FR-Spec将语言建模头的计算开销降低了高达75%，同时保持了验证过程的数学等价性并保留了最终输出分布的正确性。

items.en: FR-Spec introduces a frequency-ranked approach to speculative sampling that strategically optimizes the drafting phase while preserving the mathematical equivalence of the verification process. As shown in Figure 6, the framework operates on the principle of vocabulary space compression, where the draft model’s computational scope is restricted to a subset of high-frequency tokens, thereby reducing overhead while maintaining acceptable drafting quality.
items.zh: FR-Spec引入了一种频率排序的推测采样方法，策略性地优化了草稿阶段，同时保持了验证过程的数学等价性。如图6所示，该框架基于词汇空间压缩的原理运行，其中草稿模型的计算范围被限制在高频token的子集上，从而在保持可接受的草稿质量的同时减少开销。

items.en: Frequency-Based Vocabulary Subset Construction. The foundation of FR-Spec lies in the systematic identification and selection of high-frequency tokens. We perform corpus-level analysis on large-scale pre-training data to establish comprehensive token frequency rankings. Let f​(t)f(t) denote the frequency of token tt in the corpus 𝒞\mathcal{C}. We sort all tokens t∈𝒱t\in\mathcal{V} in descending order of frequency and select the top-kk tokens to form our reduced vocabulary subset: 𝒱high={t1,t2,…,tk} where ​f​(t1)≥f​(t2)≥⋯≥f​(tk)\mathcal{V}_{\text{high}}=\{t_{1},t_{2},\ldots,t_{k}\}\quad\text{ where }f(t_{1})\geq f(t_{2})\geq\cdots\geq f(t_{k}). Our empirical analysis indicates that selecting approximately 25% of the vocabulary (k=0.25×|𝒱|k=0.25\times|\mathcal{V}|) provides optimal performance, capturing 95% of token occurrences while achieving substantial computational reduction.
items.zh: 基于频率的词汇子集构建。FR-Spec的基础在于系统性地识别和选择高频词元。我们对大规模预训练数据进行语料库级分析，以建立全面的词元频率排名。令 f(t) 表示词元 t 在语料库 C 中的频率。我们按频率降序对所有词元 t∈V 进行排序，并选择前 k 个词元构成缩减后的词汇子集：V_high = {t1, t2, ..., tk}，其中 f(t1) ≥ f(t2) ≥ ... ≥ f(tk)。我们的实证分析表明，选择约 25% 的词汇（k = 0.25 × |V|）可获得最优性能，捕获 95% 的词元出现次数，同时实现显著的计算缩减。

items.capEn: Figure 6: The illustration of FR-Spec, which requires the draft model to use a reduced vocabulary subset.
items.capZh: 图 6：FR-Spec 的示意图，要求草稿模型使用缩减后的词汇子集。

items.en: Modified Drafting Computation. In standard speculative sampling, the draft model computes probability distributions over the entire vocabulary 𝒱\mathcal{V}. FR-Spec modifies this process by restricting computations to the reduced vocabulary subset 𝒱high\mathcal{V}_{\text{high}}. Given the original language modeling head matrix 𝐖LM∈ℝ|𝒱|×d\mathbf{W}_{\text{LM}}\in\mathbb{R}^{|\mathcal{V}|\times d}, we construct a reduced matrix 𝐖~LM∈ℝ|𝒱high|×d\mathbf{\tilde{W}}_{\text{LM}}\in\mathbb{R}^{|\mathcal{V}_{\text{high}}|\times d} by extracting rows corresponding to high-frequency tokens:
items.zh: 修改后的草稿计算。在标准推测采样中，草稿模型计算整个词汇表 V 上的概率分布。FR-Spec 通过将计算限制在缩减后的词汇子集 V_high 上来修改此过程。给定原始语言建模头矩阵 W_LM ∈ R^{|V|×d}，我们通过提取高频词元对应的行来构建缩减矩阵 W̃_LM ∈ R^{|V_high|×d}：

items.en: The modified drafting computation becomes:
items.zh: 修改后的草稿计算变为：

items.en: where 𝐇draft​(𝐱)∈ℝn×d\mathbf{H}_{\text{draft}}(\mathbf{x})\in\mathbb{R}^{n\times d} represents the hidden states from the draft model for the input sequence 𝐱\mathbf{x}.
items.zh: 其中 H_draft(x) ∈ R^{n×d} 表示草稿模型对输入序列 x 的隐藏状态。

items.en: Verification Process. A critical design principle of FR-Spec is maintaining the mathematical correctness and distributional equivalence of the verification process. The target LLM continues to operate over the complete vocabulary space 𝒱\mathcal{V}, ensuring that the final output distribution remains identical to standard speculative sampling methods: 𝒫target​(𝐱)=Softmax​(𝐇target​(𝐱)​𝐖LMT)\mathcal{P}_{\text{target}}(\mathbf{x})=\text{Softmax}(\mathbf{H}_{\text{target}}(\mathbf{x})\mathbf{W}_{\text{LM}}^{T}). This preservation guarantees that FR-Spec produces statistically equivalent results while achieving computational speedup.
items.zh: 验证过程。FR-Spec 的一个关键设计原则是保持验证过程的数学正确性和分布等价性。目标 LLM 继续在完整词汇空间 V 上运行，确保最终输出分布与标准推测采样方法保持一致：P_target(x) = Softmax(H_target(x) W_LM^T)。这种保留保证了 FR-Spec 在实现计算加速的同时产生统计等价的结果。

items.en: Computational Complexity Analysis. The computational benefits of FR-Spec are substantial and well-defined. The language modeling head computation complexity reduces from O​(n​d​|𝒱|)\mathrm{O}(nd|\mathcal{V}|) to O​(n​d​|𝒱high|)\mathrm{O}(nd|\mathcal{V}_{\text{high}}|), where nn is the draft sequence length and dd is the hidden dimension. The reduction factor is |𝒱||𝒱high|\frac{|\mathcal{V}|}{|\mathcal{V}_{\text{high}}|}. Similarly, the softmax computation scales down proportionally, as the input dimension reduces from ℝn×|𝒱|\mathbb{R}^{n\times|\mathcal{V}|} to ℝn×|𝒱high|\mathbb{R}^{n\times|\mathcal{V}_{\text{high}}|}. For typical configurations where |𝒱high|=0.25×|𝒱||\mathcal{V}_{\text{high}}|=0.25\times|\mathcal{V}|, this represents a 4×4\times reduction in computational overhead for the language modeling head of drafting models.
items.zh: 计算复杂度分析。FR-Spec 的计算优势显著且明确。语言建模头的计算复杂度从 O(nd|V|) 降低到 O(nd|V_high|)，其中 n 是草稿序列长度，d 是隐藏维度。缩减因子为 |V|/|V_high|。类似地，softmax 计算也按比例缩减，因为输入维度从 R^{n×|V|} 减少到 R^{n×|V_high|}。对于典型配置（|V_high| = 0.25 × |V|），这表示草稿模型语言建模头的计算开销减少了 4 倍。

items.en: FR-Spec is designed as a plug-and-play enhancement that seamlessly integrates with existing speculative sampling techniques without requiring model retraining or architectural modifications. The method can be applied to various speculative sampling frameworks by simply replacing the standard drafting computation with the frequency-ranked variant.
items.zh: FR-Spec 设计为即插即用的增强方法，可无缝集成到现有的推测采样技术中，无需模型重新训练或架构修改。该方法只需将标准草稿计算替换为基于频率排名的变体，即可应用于各种推测采样框架。

items.en: As we mentioned above, PTQ and QAT are both important approaches for model quantization. Compared with QAT, PTQ is lighter and easier to conduct. PTQ for on-device deployment necessitates simultaneous quantization of both weights and activations due to constrained computational resources.
items.zh: 如上所述，PTQ 和 QAT 都是模型量化的重要方法。与 QAT 相比，PTQ 更轻量且更易实施。由于计算资源受限，面向端侧部署的 PTQ 需要同时对权重和激活进行量化。

items.en: Recent studies demonstrate that most LLMs exhibit massive activations (Sun et al., 2024b) at initial token positions, substantially degrading activation quantization fidelity. To address this challenge, we follow the PrefixQuant method (Chen et al., 2024) to isolate these initial token activation outliers. Specifically, our solution stores initial key-value activations during preprocessing, thereby preventing excessive activation magnitudes throughout the forward propagation of the first few input tokens.
items.zh: 近期研究表明，大多数 LLM 在初始词元位置表现出大规模激活（Sun 等人，2024b），严重降低了激活量化保真度。为解决这一挑战，我们遵循 PrefixQuant 方法（Chen 等人，2024），隔离这些初始词元激活异常值。具体来说，我们的解决方案在预处理阶段存储初始键值激活，从而防止前几个输入词元的前向传播中出现过大的激活幅度。

items.en: Although PrefixQuant to some extent addresses activation outliers during inference, we observe that initial token bias also significantly impacts the weight quantization calibration process. Building on this insight, we develop Prefix-Aware GPTQ (P-GPTQ), an extension of the GPTQ method (Frantar et al., 2023) that eliminates initial token interference during Hessian computation. Formally, GPTQ computes the Hessian matrix 𝐇\mathbf{H} from the calibration data 𝐗∈ℝn×d\mathbf{X}\in\mathbb{R}^{n\times d} as
items.zh: 尽管 PrefixQuant 在一定程度上解决了推理过程中的激活异常值问题，但我们观察到初始词元偏差也显著影响权重量化校准过程。基于这一见解，我们开发了 Prefix-Aware GPTQ（P-GPTQ），这是 GPTQ 方法（Frantar 等人，2023）的扩展，在 Hessian 矩阵计算中消除了初始词元干扰。形式上，GPTQ 从校准数据 X ∈ R^{n×d} 计算 Hessian 矩阵 H 为：

items.en: Our experimental analysis on \modelname shows that, when computing the covariance matrix 𝐇\mathbf{H} for down-projection layers, particularly in those deeper Transformer blocks, the beginning of sentence token and some initial tokens consistently introduce significant statistical bias. These initial positions exhibit activation magnitudes 10×\times larger than subsequent tokens, disproportionately dominating the covariance structure and leading to suboptimal quantization parameters. To mitigate this bias, P-GPTQ implements a position-aware calibration strategy. Through empirical analysis across multiple layers, we find that token positions starting from s=4s=4 exhibit stable statistical features. We compute the Hessian matrix only considering stable token positions as
items.zh: 我们对 \modelname 的实验分析表明，在计算下投影层的协方差矩阵 H 时，尤其是在较深的 Transformer 块中，句子起始词元和某些初始词元始终引入显著的统计偏差。这些初始位置的激活幅度比后续词元大 10 倍以上，不成比例地主导了协方差结构，导致量化参数次优。为减轻这种偏差，P-GPTQ 实现了位置感知的校准策略。通过对多个层的实证分析，我们发现从 s=4 开始的词元位置表现出稳定的统计特征。我们仅考虑稳定词元位置来计算 Hessian 矩阵：

items.en: where 𝐗valid=𝐗[s:]\mathbf{X}_{\text{valid}}=\mathbf{X}_{[s:]}excludes the first ss positions. The idea of P-GPTQ maintains the compatibility with other quantization techniques, including rotation methods like Quarot (Ashkboos et al., 2024) and smoothing methods like AWQ (Lin et al., 2024b), enabling seamless integration into existing quantization pipelines.
items.zh: 其中 X_valid = X_{[s:]} 排除了前 s 个位置。P-GPTQ 的思想保持了与其他量化技术的兼容性，包括旋转方法（如 Quarot（Ashkboos 等人，2024））和平滑方法（如 AWQ（Lin 等人，2024b）），从而能够无缝集成到现有量化流程中。

items.en: We evaluate P-GPTQ and its extension under the setting where all linear layers are quantized to a per-group INT4 format. The calibration employs 1,024 randomly selected sequences from the training dataset. Table 4 presents comparative results across quantization methods, where S denotes the smoothing process applied via AWQ preprocessing. The results demonstrate that S-P-GPTQ achieves superior performance among quantized methods, exhibiting the smallest performance degradation compared to the FP16 baseline.
items.zh: 我们评估了 P-GPTQ 及其扩展，设置所有线性层量化为每组 INT4 格式。校准使用训练数据集中随机选择的 1,024 个序列。表 4 展示了不同量化方法的比较结果，其中 S 表示通过 AWQ 预处理应用的平滑过程。结果表明，S-P-GPTQ 在量化方法中实现了最优性能，与 FP16 基线相比性能下降最小。

items.en: Quantization for Target Model In SpecMQuant (Zhang et al., 2025b), we provide a systematic analysis of key factors to consider when applying speculative sampling to quantized models. For example, when using EAGLE-2 with W4A16 target models (such as the model quantized by GPTQ (Frantar et al., 2023)), the drafting process should use fewer draft tokens compared to non-quantized target models since the quantization model has alleviated the memory access bottleneck of target models. Specifically, denote the verification time of nn draft tokens as Tv​(n)T_{v}(n) and the vanilla decoding time of the target model as TtT_{t}, the verification-to-decoding time ratio Tv​(n)/TtT_{v}(n)/T_{t} grows significantly faster with increasing nn in the quantized model compared to that in the non-quantized model. This results in the increased acceptance length from using more draft tokens being offset by the significant extension in verification time.
items.zh: 目标模型的量化。在 SpecMQuant（Zhang 等人，2025b）中，我们系统分析了将推测采样应用于量化模型时需要考虑的关键因素。例如，当使用 EAGLE-2 与 W4A16 目标模型（如 GPTQ（Frantar 等人，2023）量化的模型）时，草稿过程应使用比非量化目标模型更少的草稿词元，因为量化模型已缓解了目标模型的内存访问瓶颈。具体来说，将 n 个草稿词元的验证时间记为 T_v(n)，目标模型的原始解码时间记为 T_t，则验证与解码时间比 T_v(n)/T_t 在量化模型中随 n 增加的增长速度显著快于非量化模型。这导致使用更多草稿词元带来的接受长度增加被验证时间的显著延长所抵消。

items.en: Quantization for Draft Model We further apply quantization to the EAGLE-2 draft model. This could make the drafting process even faster. Additionally, compressing the draft model to a 4-bit version also makes it suitable for memory-constrained end-side deployment. However, QSpec (Zhao et al., 2024) finds that using GPTQ on EAGLE-2 would lead to substantial degradation of the acceptance rate. Therefore, we change to using QAT (Section 3.3) on EAGLE-2. We verify that the EAGLE-2 quantized by our QAT method does no harm to the average acceptance length of the speculative sampling process.
items.zh: 草稿模型的量化。我们进一步对 EAGLE-2 草稿模型应用量化。这可以使草稿过程更快。此外，将草稿模型压缩为 4 位版本也使其适用于内存受限的端侧部署。然而，QSpec（Zhao 等人，2024）发现，在 EAGLE-2 上使用 GPTQ 会导致接受率大幅下降。因此，我们改用 QAT（第 3.3 节）对 EAGLE-2 进行量化。我们验证了通过我们的 QAT 方法量化的 EAGLE-2 不会损害推测采样过程的平均接受长度。

items.en: InfLLM v2 for Target Model We implement the InfLLM v2 sparse attention kernel for long-context scenarios. To support tree-style draft verification in speculative sampling, assuming the total number of drafted tokens is nn, we only construct a local 2d attention mask for the last n×nn\times n region and compress the mask via uint64 bit-packing before passing it to the InfLLM v2 kernel.
items.zh: 目标模型的 InfLLM v2。我们为长上下文场景实现了 InfLLM v2 稀疏注意力核。为支持推测采样中的树形草稿验证，假设草稿词元总数为 n，我们仅构建最后 n×n 区域的局部 2D 注意力掩码，并通过 uint64 位打包压缩掩码，然后将其传递给 InfLLM v2 核。

items.en: Sliding Window for Draft Model For long-context scenarios, if the draft model in speculative sampling uses full attention, it will significantly increase the model’s first-token latency. Following the approach in TriForce (Sun et al., 2024a), we apply sliding window attention to the draft model. Our experiments show that this not only minimizes the impact on first-token latency but also improves drafting accuracy.
items.zh: 草稿模型的滑动窗口。对于长上下文场景，如果推测采样中的草稿模型使用全注意力，将显著增加模型的首词元延迟。遵循 TriForce（Sun 等人，2024a）的方法，我们对草稿模型应用滑动窗口注意力。我们的实验表明，这不仅最小化了对首词元延迟的影响，还提高了草稿准确性。

items.en: Beyond the challenges of limited computational resources, the fragmentation of end-side chips presents another significant hurdle. This fragmentation necessitates adapting models to multiple platforms and chip types for each new model release, leading to complex adaptation and deployment. This results in a great amount of engineering effort, making it nearly impossible for models to run efficiently across all platforms.
items.zh: 除了有限计算资源的挑战外，端侧芯片的碎片化构成了另一个重大障碍。这种碎片化要求每次发布新模型时，模型需要适配多个平台和芯片类型，导致复杂的适配和部署。这带来了大量的工程工作，使得模型几乎不可能在所有平台上高效运行。

items.en: The core of this problem lies in decoupling and efficient code reuse: How can a single technical development and engineering effort be automatically applied across multiple platforms?
items.zh: 这个问题的核心在于解耦和高效的代码复用：如何将单一的技术开发和工程工作自动应用于多个平台？

items.en: To address these pain points, we propose ArkInfer, a novel cross-platform deployment system. ArkInfer is designed to overcome the fragmentation of end-side chips by providing highly efficient inference speed and serving as a versatile cross-platform compatibility layer for various model applications. To achieve this, we introduce three key solutions: (1) a cross-platform compatible architecture design, (2) reusable and efficient speculative and constrained decoding schemes, and (3) an extensible model zoo frontend.
items.zh: 为了解决这些痛点，我们提出了ArkInfer，一种新颖的跨平台部署系统。ArkInfer旨在通过提供高效的推理速度并作为各种模型应用的通用跨平台兼容层，来克服终端芯片的碎片化问题。为此，我们引入了三个关键解决方案：(1) 跨平台兼容的架构设计，(2) 可重用且高效的推测性和约束解码方案，以及(3) 可扩展的模型库前端。

items.en: ArkInfer’s architectural design is fundamentally driven by the need for unified, efficient deployment across a fragmented landscape of end-side hardware. Supporting diverse platforms such as MediaTek, Nvidia, Qualcomm, and Rockchip, each with its native inference frameworks (e.g., NeuroPilot, Genie, RK-LLM, TensorRT-LLM, and llama.cpp for CPU), ArkInfer seamlessly integrates these as adaptable backends.
items.zh: ArkInfer的架构设计从根本上源于在碎片化的终端硬件环境中实现统一高效部署的需求。它支持多种平台，如联发科、英伟达、高通和瑞芯微，每个平台都有其原生推理框架（例如，NeuroPilot、Genie、RK-LLM、TensorRT-LLM和用于CPU的llama.cpp），ArkInfer将这些框架无缝集成为可适配的后端。

items.en: At its core, ArkInfer implements a powerful abstraction layer. This layer features a system of adapters that normalize the varied APIs of different backends, presenting a consistent interface to higher-level components. This ensures seamless interaction regardless of the underlying hardware or framework. Data handling is further streamlined through a unified Tensor structure, which wraps diverse data types and dimensions for consistent manipulation across the system. Critical for LLM efficiency, a dedicated KV cache manager intelligently orchestrates historical state storage and retrieval, optimizing subsequent token generation.
items.zh: ArkInfer的核心实现了一个强大的抽象层。该层具有一个适配器系统，用于规范化不同后端的各种API，为更高级别的组件提供一致的接口。这确保了无论底层硬件或框架如何，都能实现无缝交互。通过统一的张量结构进一步简化了数据处理，该结构封装了不同的数据类型和维度，以便在系统中进行一致的操作。对于LLM效率至关重要的专用KV缓存管理器智能地协调历史状态的存储和检索，优化后续词元生成。

items.en: The central component of this architecture is an abstract executor interface, which governs the runtime execution of all model-related processes, with inputs and outputs defined by fundamental tensor types. This encompasses core neural network execution (handling the encoding of various input modalities like text, images, and audio, and autoregressive decoding), sophisticated sampling techniques for generating diverse outputs, and comprehensive preprocessing capabilities to prepare data for model input. Beyond these, ArkInfer also orchestrates complex pre-trained models by composing these fundamental executors and manages interactions with external tool-calling functionalities.
items.zh: 该架构的核心组件是一个抽象执行器接口，它管理所有模型相关过程的运行时执行，输入和输出由基本张量类型定义。这涵盖了核心神经网络执行（处理文本、图像和音频等多种输入模态的编码以及自回归解码）、用于生成多样化输出的复杂采样技术，以及为模型输入准备数据的全面预处理能力。除此之外，ArkInfer还通过组合这些基本执行器来编排复杂的预训练模型，并管理与外部工具调用功能的交互。

items.en: This design enables heterogeneous scheduling at the executor granularity, allowing us to fully leverage diverse computing resources. Furthermore, by tracing executor execution, we can track the flow of data and operations, which greatly facilitates debugging and performance analysis, particularly for crucial per-stage precision alignment—a common pain point in end-side adaptation.
items.zh: 这种设计实现了执行器粒度上的异构调度，使我们能够充分利用多样化的计算资源。此外，通过追踪执行器的执行，我们可以跟踪数据和操作的流程，这极大地促进了调试和性能分析，特别是对于关键的逐阶段精度对齐——这是终端适配中的一个常见痛点。

items.en: Efficient LLM inference techniques generally fall into three categories: quantization, sparsity, and acceleration of the autoregressive process. While the first two, such as GPTQ, MoE, and our InfLLMv2, are often deeply coupled with specific hardware or operator implementations, acceleration techniques like speculative sampling and constrained decoding are relatively loosely coupled with the underlying hardware. This decoupling allows us to implement these optimizations once within a deployment framework and enable them across multiple chip architectures. Therefore, ArkInfer integrates both speculative sampling and constrained decoding functionalities. Our design philosophy centers on achieving universal applicability and ease of integration within the existing execution backends.
items.zh: 高效的LLM推理技术通常分为三类：量化、稀疏性和自回归过程的加速。虽然前两类（如GPTQ、MoE和我们的InfLLMv2）通常与特定硬件或算子实现深度耦合，但推测性采样和约束解码等加速技术与底层硬件的耦合相对松散。这种解耦使我们能够在部署框架中一次性实现这些优化，并在多种芯片架构上启用它们。因此，ArkInfer集成了推测性采样和约束解码功能。我们的设计理念侧重于在现有执行后端中实现通用适用性和易于集成。

items.en: Central to ArkInfer’s ability to generate output tokens is a core component that takes processed input and orchestrates the autoregressive generation process. This component supports a range of advanced decoding strategies to meet diverse inference needs:
items.zh: ArkInfer生成输出词元的核心是一个组件，它接收处理后的输入并编排自回归生成过程。该组件支持一系列高级解码策略，以满足不同的推理需求：

items.en: Accelerated Speculative Decoding For enhanced inference speed, besides the above-mentioned speculative sampling methods, ArkInfer incorporates an advanced speculative decoding mechanism based on the BiTA algorithm (Lin et al., 2024a). This technique is a strategic choice because it dramatically boosts performance without requiring additional draft models or specialized architectural changes, simplifying deployment on resource-constrained end-side devices while maintaining high output quality.
items.zh: 加速推测性解码 为了提升推理速度，除了上述推测性采样方法外，ArkInfer还基于BiTA算法（Lin等人，2024a）集成了先进的推测性解码机制。选择该技术是因为它无需额外的草稿模型或专门的架构更改即可显著提升性能，从而简化了在资源受限的终端设备上的部署，同时保持了高输出质量。

items.en: Constrained Decoding To ensure outputs adhere to specific formats, such as JSON or SQL, ArkInfer employs a powerful constrained decoding method leveraging the Guidance algorithm. This approach is selected for its superior ability to enforce structural adherence and provide deterministic responses, which is crucial for applications that demand structured or precise outputs.
items.zh: 约束解码 为了确保输出符合特定格式（如JSON或SQL），ArkInfer采用了一种强大的约束解码方法，利用Guidance算法。选择该方法是因为它在强制结构遵循和提供确定性响应方面具有卓越能力，这对于需要结构化或精确输出的应用至关重要。

items.en: A key hurdle in deploying models on edge-side devices stems from the fragmented nature of model file structures. Various chip manufacturers frequently impose their own distinct requirements and formats, resulting in a convoluted and inefficient deployment workflow. We contend that the optimal approach involves maintaining a centralized model zoo offering a broad selection of pre-adapted models.
items.zh: 在边缘设备上部署模型的一个关键障碍源于模型文件结构的碎片化。各种芯片制造商经常施加各自独特的要求和格式，导致部署工作流程复杂且低效。我们认为最佳方法是维护一个集中的模型库，提供广泛的预适配模型选择。

items.en: To tackle this, we engineer an extensible, cross-platform frontend for ArkInfer. This interface allows users to directly access and execute various models in our model zoo, thereby notably streamlining the deployment of MiniCPM and other models across diverse devices. In addition to accelerating the growth and maintenance of our model zoo, we also create an automated model conversion pipeline. This system can efficiently convert models into the formats required by different platforms, greatly accelerating the ongoing development of our model zoo.
items.zh: 为了解决这个问题，我们为ArkInfer设计了一个可扩展的跨平台前端。该接口允许用户直接访问和执行我们模型库中的各种模型，从而显著简化了MiniCPM和其他模型在不同设备上的部署。除了加速我们模型库的增长和维护外，我们还创建了一个自动化的模型转换流水线。该系统可以高效地将模型转换为不同平台所需的格式，极大地加速了我们模型库的持续开发。

items.en: Based on the efficient training and inference mechanism, we bulid \modelname-8B and \modelname-0.5B. In this section, we evaluate the effectiveness and efficiency of our models on several open-source benchmarks.
items.zh: 基于高效的训练和推理机制，我们构建了\modelname-8B和\modelname-0.5B。在本节中，我们在几个开源基准上评估了我们模型的有效性和效率。

items.en: Benchmarks \modelname was primarily pre-trained on Chinese and English corpora. Therefore, we select the following datasets to evaluate our model, including knowledge-intensive evaluation sets MMLU (Hendrycks et al., 2020), CMMLU (Li et al., 2024a), and CEval (Huang et al., 2023) for English and Chinese, and reasoning evaluation sets including general reasoning BigBench Hard (BBH) (Suzgun et al., 2023), mathematical reasoning GSM8K (Cobbe et al., 2021) and MATH500 (Hendrycks et al., 2021), and code reasoning MBPP (Austin et al., 2021) and HumanEval (Chen et al., 2021). We adopt OpenCompass (Contributors, 2023) as our evaluation framework.
items.zh: 基准测试 \modelname主要在中文和英文语料上进行预训练。因此，我们选择以下数据集来评估我们的模型，包括知识密集型评估集MMLU（Hendrycks等人，2020）、CMMLU（Li等人，2024a）和CEval（Huang等人，2023）用于英文和中文，以及推理评估集，包括通用推理BigBench Hard（BBH）（Suzgun等人，2023）、数学推理GSM8K（Cobbe等人，2021）和MATH500（Hendrycks等人，2021），以及代码推理MBPP（Austin等人，2021）和HumanEval（Chen等人，2021）。我们采用OpenCompass（Contributors，2023）作为我们的评估框架。

items.en: Baseline Models We compare \modelname-8B and \modelname-0.5B with several widely-adopted open-source LLMs. Specifically, for \modelname-0.5B, we select several models with approximately 1 billion parameters, including Qwen3-0.5B (Yang et al., 2025), Llama3.2-1B (Dubey et al., 2024), Gemma3-1B (Team et al., 2025). These models are well-trained with trillions of tokens and trained with knowledge distillation, which ensures their effectiveness. For \modelname-8B, we select models with approximately 10 billions parameters as baselines, including Qwen3-8B (Yang et al., 2025), GLM4 (0414 version) (GLM et al., 2024), Gemma3-12B (Team et al., 2025), and Phi4-14B (Abdin et al., 2024).
items.zh: 基线模型 我们将\modelname-8B和\modelname-0.5B与几个广泛采用的开源LLM进行比较。具体来说，对于\modelname-0.5B，我们选择了几个大约10亿参数的模型，包括Qwen3-0.5B（Yang等人，2025）、Llama3.2-1B（Dubey等人，2024）、Gemma3-1B（Team等人，2025）。这些模型经过数万亿词元的充分训练，并使用了知识蒸馏，确保了它们的有效性。对于\modelname-8B，我们选择了大约100亿参数的模型作为基线，包括Qwen3-8B（Yang等人，2025）、GLM4（0414版本）（GLM等人，2024）、Gemma3-12B（Team等人，2025）和Phi4-14B（Abdin等人，2024）。

items.en: Pre-training Pipeline We adopt μ\muP as our basic model architecture. Before model pre-training, we first search for hyperparameters, including learning rate, batch size, and parameter initial settings, with models containing millions of parameters. Then we follow a four-stage pipeline to pre-train \modelname. First, we conduct a stable pre-training stage using 77 trillion tokens with a learning rate as 7×10−​37\times 10^{-}3. Then we perform an annealing pre-training stage using 11 trillion tokens. For these two stages, the context length is set as 44K. To enable long-sequence processing, we extend the context window from 44K to 32​K32K. In this stage, we train our model with 2020 billion tokens and use LongRoPE (Ding et al., 2024) as our position encoding. Notably, though we only train our model in 3232K context, \modelname can process 128128K sequences with YaRN (Peng et al., 2023). Following three pre-training stages, we conduct supervised fine-tuning and reinforcement learning to make our models helpful, honest, and harmless. To achieve ultimate inference speedup, we further conduct additional training for the speculative head to improve the acceptance length of the draft model. Notably, based on \modelname, we will release end-side reasoning models in the coming weeks.
items.zh: 预训练流水线 我们采用μ\muP作为我们的基本模型架构。在模型预训练之前，我们首先使用包含数百万参数的模型搜索超参数，包括学习率、批量大小和参数初始设置。然后我们遵循一个四阶段流水线来预训练\modelname。首先，我们使用7万亿词元进行稳定的预训练阶段，学习率为7×10−​37\times 10^{-}3。然后我们使用1万亿词元进行退火预训练阶段。在这两个阶段，上下文长度设置为44K。为了支持长序列处理，我们将上下文窗口从44K扩展到32​K32K。在这个阶段，我们用2020亿词元训练模型，并使用LongRoPE（Ding等人，2024）作为位置编码。值得注意的是，尽管我们只在3232K上下文中训练模型，但\modelname可以使用YaRN（Peng等人，2023）处理128128K序列。在三个预训练阶段之后，我们进行监督微调和强化学习，使我们的模型有用、诚实且无害。为了实现最终的推理加速，我们进一步对推测头进行额外训练，以提高草稿模型的接受长度。值得注意的是，基于\modelname，我们将在未来几周内发布终端推理模型。

items.en: We show the evaluation results of \modelname and baseline models in Table 5. From the results, we can observe that: 1) Both of our models achieve state-of-the-art performance among models of similar size, demonstrating the effectiveness of our training strategies. Furthermore, our models outperform several open-source large language models with significantly more parameters. For instance, \modelname-0.5B achieves superior performance compared to Llama3.2-1B and Gemma3-1B, despite these models having twice the parameter scale of \modelname. Similarly, \modelname-8B surpasses Gemma3-12B and Phi4-14B. This further validates that by leveraging high-quality data and efficient learning algorithms, \modelname can achieve exceptional performance. 2) Compared to these open-source models, \modelname achieves excellent performance with significantly lower training costs. Specifically, \modelname demonstrates comparable performance to Qwen3, while Qwen3 utilizes 3636 trillion tokens for training compared to \modelname’s 8 trillion tokens – representing only 22% of Qwen3’s training data scale. 3) Among the baseline models, including Qwen3-0.6B/8B, Llama3.2-1B, and Gemma3-1B/12B, employ knowledge distillation training strategies, using larger teacher models to guide the training of end-side models. Our experimental results show that despite using only ground-truth as the supervision signals, our model still exhibits strong performance. The distillation process requires substantial computational resources to deploy teacher models. In the future, we will explore more efficient model distillation strategies to further enhance the performance of our end-side models.
items.zh: 我们在表5中展示了\modelname和基线模型的评估结果。从结果中我们可以观察到：1）我们的两个模型在相似规模的模型中均达到了最先进的性能，证明了我们训练策略的有效性。此外，我们的模型在参数数量显著更多的情况下，仍优于几个开源大语言模型。例如，\modelname-0.5B的性能优于Llama3.2-1B和Gemma3-1B，尽管这些模型的参数规模是\modelname的两倍。同样，\modelname-8B超越了Gemma3-12B和Phi4-14B。这进一步验证了通过利用高质量数据和高效学习算法，\modelname可以实现卓越的性能。2）与这些开源模型相比，\modelname以显著更低的训练成本实现了出色的性能。具体来说，\modelname表现出与Qwen3相当的性能，而Qwen3使用了3636万亿词元进行训练，而\modelname仅使用了8万亿词元——仅占Qwen3训练数据规模的22%。3）在基线模型中，包括Qwen3-0.6B/8B、Llama3.2-1B和Gemma3-1B/12B，采用了知识蒸馏训练策略，使用更大的教师模型来指导终端模型的训练。我们的实验结果表明，尽管仅使用真实标签作为监督信号，我们的模型仍然表现出强大的性能。蒸馏过程需要大量的计算资源来部署教师模型。未来，我们将探索更高效的模型蒸馏策略，以进一步提升我们终端模型的性能。

items.capEn: Figure 7: The evaluation results for long sequence prefilling.
items.capZh: 图7：长序列预填充的评估结果。

items.en: In \modelname, we extend the context window to 3232K using the sparse attention mechanism. In this paragraph, we evaluate \modelname on long sequence understanding task. Specifically, we follow Hsieh et al. (2024) and evaluate our model on the needle in a haystack task (RULER-NIAH). We apply YaRN (Peng et al., 2023) to extend the context window of \modelname to 128128K and evaluate \modelname with 128128K NIAH.
items.zh: 在\modelname中，我们使用稀疏注意力机制将上下文窗口扩展到3232K。在本段中，我们评估\modelname在长序列理解任务上的表现。具体来说，我们遵循Hsieh等人（2024）的方法，在“大海捞针”任务（RULER-NIAH）上评估我们的模型。我们应用YaRN（Peng等人，2023）将\modelname的上下文窗口扩展到128128K，并使用128128K NIAH评估\modelname。

items.en: The results are shown in Figure 7. From the results, we can observe that: 1) \modelname can achieve satisfactory performance on long sequences and achieve 100%100\% accuracy on the needle in a haystack task. And for each token, \modelname only requires the model to attend 66K context tokens, which means on 128128K context, the sparsity of \modelname is only 5%5\%. 2) \modelname has good performance on context window extrapolation. Even we only pre-train the model on 3232K context, \modelname can achieve 100100% accuracy on 4×4\times context length. In the following sections, we apply \modelname on the survey generation task, which requires the model to read and write long documents. And \modelname can achieve better performance than other baseline models, showing the effectiveness of \modelname on long-sequence processing.
items.zh: 结果如图7所示。从结果中我们可以观察到：1）\modelname在长序列上能够取得令人满意的性能，并在“大海捞针”任务上达到100%100\%的准确率。对于每个词元，\modelname只需要模型关注66K上下文词元，这意味着在128128K上下文中，\modelname的稀疏性仅为5%5\%。2）\modelname在上下文窗口外推方面表现良好。即使我们仅在3232K上下文中预训练模型，\modelname在4×4\倍上下文长度上也能达到100100%的准确率。在接下来的部分中，我们将\modelname应用于调查生成任务，该任务要求模型读取和撰写长文档。\modelname能够取得比其他基线模型更好的性能，显示了\modelname在长序列处理方面的有效性。

items.en: To achieve ultimate inference acceleration, we construct a sparse attention mechanism, InfLLM v2, in \modelname, employ speculative sampling algorithms, FR-Spec, propose prefix-aware quantization algorithms, and build our specialized inference framework to realize ultimate speedup on end-side devices. To validate the effectiveness of our proposed algorithms, we test our model’s efficiency on two typical end-side chips in this section. Specifically, we select two edge chips: Jetson AGX Orin and RTX 4090. The former is widely deployed in end-side scenarios such as automotive chips and robotics, while the latter is primarily used as computing equipment in personal computers.
items.zh: 为了实现最终的推理加速，我们在\modelname中构建了稀疏注意力机制InfLLM v2，采用了推测性采样算法FR-Spec，提出了前缀感知量化算法，并构建了专门的推理框架，以在终端设备上实现极致加速。为了验证我们提出算法的有效性，我们在本节中测试了模型在两个典型终端芯片上的效率。具体来说，我们选择了两个边缘芯片：Jetson AGX Orin和RTX 4090。前者广泛部署在汽车芯片和机器人等终端场景中，而后者主要用作个人计算机中的计算设备。

items.en: The evaluation results are shown in Figure 1. We evaluate the throughput speed of Llama3-8B (Dubey et al., 2024), GLM4-9B (GLM et al., 2024), Qwen3-8B (Yang et al., 2025), and \modelname on sequences ranging from 3232K to 128128K. From the results, we can observe that: 1) Compared with open-source LLMs with similar parameter size, we can achieve consistent speedup in both prefilling and decoding scenarios. Specifically, compared to Qwen3-8B, we achieve approximately 7x decoding acceleration on Jetson AGX Orin. The results demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach. 2) As the text length increases, the efficiency advantage of our model becomes more pronounced. This is because the sparse attention mechanism can effectively reduce the computational and memory access overhead for long texts. As the text length that the model needs to process gradually increases, the memory access overhead of traditional dense attention mechanisms grows rapidly, while the number of context blocks that InfLLM v2 needs to access remains constant, with only the representation of semantic kernels growing slowly with sequence length. Therefore, in long sequence processing, \modelname can consistently handle long texts efficiently.
items.zh: 评估结果如图1所示。我们在从3232K到128128K的序列上评估了Llama3-8B (Dubey et al., 2024)、GLM4-9B (GLM et al., 2024)、Qwen3-8B (Yang et al., 2025) 和 \modelname 的吞吐速度。从结果中我们可以观察到：1) 与参数规模相似的开源LLM相比，我们在预填充和解码场景中均能实现一致的加速。具体来说，与Qwen3-8B相比，我们在Jetson AGX Orin上实现了约7倍的解码加速。结果证明了我们方法的有效性。2) 随着文本长度的增加，我们模型的效率优势变得更加明显。这是因为稀疏注意力机制可以有效减少长文本的计算和内存访问开销。随着模型需要处理的文本长度逐渐增加，传统密集注意力机制的内存访问开销迅速增长，而InfLLM v2需要访问的上下文块数量保持不变，只有语义核的表示随序列长度缓慢增长。因此，在长序列处理中，\modelname 能够持续高效地处理长文本。

items.en: The efficiency of \modelname unlock compelling capabilities across diverse scenarios. We highlight three key applications: (1) Trustworthy Survey Generation demonstrates its strength in efficient long-sequence processing, crucial for understanding and synthesizing complex information from large documents to produce accurate summaries. (2) Tool Use with Model Context Protocol is pivotal for agent-centric deployments, enabling \modelname to reliably interpret instructions, context, and state information to seamlessly interact with external tools and APIs – essential for building robust, capable agents.
items.zh: \modelname 的效率在不同场景中解锁了引人注目的能力。我们重点介绍三个关键应用：(1) 可信调查生成展示了其在高效长序列处理方面的优势，这对于理解和综合来自大型文档的复杂信息以生成准确摘要至关重要。(2) 基于模型上下文协议的工具使用对于以智能体为中心的部署至关重要，使 \modelname 能够可靠地解释指令、上下文和状态信息，从而无缝地与外部工具和API交互——这对于构建稳健、有能力的智能体至关重要。

items.en: Developing a comprehensive literature survey presents a significant challenge, even for experienced researchers. This endeavor necessitates sophisticated capabilities, including collecting pertinent resources, aggregating and synthesizing diverse information, pinpointing critical challenges, and forecasting future research trajectories. Fortunately, the swift evolution of AI technologies, spurred by LLMs, is rendering automated deep research increasingly feasible. Recent efforts (Wang et al., 2024c; Li et al., 2025b; Wang et al., 2025a), such as projects like OpenAI Deep Research555https://openai.com/index/introducing-deep-research and Gemini Deep Research666https://gemini.google/overview/deep-research, leverage the long-form reasoning capabilities of modern LLMs to construct practical survey systems, simplifying the process for human researchers to assimilate extensive academic literature and rapidly grasp new fields of study.
items.zh: 开发一份全面的文献综述即使对经验丰富的研究人员来说也是一项重大挑战。这项工作需要复杂的能力，包括收集相关资源、汇总和综合多样信息、识别关键挑战以及预测未来研究方向。幸运的是，由LLM推动的人工智能技术的快速发展使得自动化深度研究越来越可行。最近的努力 (Wang et al., 2024c; Li et al., 2025b; Wang et al., 2025a)，例如 OpenAI Deep Research555https://openai.com/index/introducing-deep-research 和 Gemini Deep Research666https://gemini.google/overview/deep-research 等项目，利用现代LLM的长篇推理能力构建实用的调查系统，简化了人类研究人员吸收大量学术文献并快速掌握新研究领域的过程。

items.en: On-device survey systems present important advantages complementary to cloud-based services. Crucially, for users with strict confidentiality needs who cannot upload resources to the cloud, locally deployed, in-house models are the only viable option. This maintains data integrity and control. Furthermore, deploying smaller-scale models on-device significantly cuts computational costs during inference, a key consideration given the high token consumption inherent in the survey writing process. This makes localized systems both secure and economically sensible for many applications.
items.zh: 设备端调查系统具有补充云服务的重要优势。关键的是，对于有严格保密需求且无法将资源上传到云端的用户，本地部署的内部模型是唯一可行的选择。这保持了数据的完整性和控制权。此外，在设备上部署较小规模的模型显著降低了推理过程中的计算成本，考虑到调查撰写过程中固有的高令牌消耗，这是一个关键考虑因素。这使得本地化系统对于许多应用既安全又经济合理。

items.en: To this end, we propose \modelname-Survey, a model built upon \modelname-8B that is capable of generating trustworthy, long-form survey papers while maintaining competitive performance relative to significantly larger models. Specifically, our model works in a Plan-Retrieve-Write manner, wherein it operates through three core stages: (1) Planning: defining the overall structure of the survey from a global perspective, specifying the content to be addressed in each section, subsection, and paragraph; (2) Retrieval: generating appropriate retrieval keywords based on the planner-generated outline and querying a knowledge base to obtain relevant literature; and (3) Writing: synthesizing the retrieved information to generate coherent section-level content, iteratively proceeding until the entire survey is complete.
items.zh: 为此，我们提出 \modelname-Survey，这是一个基于 \modelname-8B 构建的模型，能够生成可信的长篇调查论文，同时保持与显著更大模型相比具有竞争力的性能。具体来说，我们的模型以“规划-检索-撰写”的方式工作，通过三个核心阶段运行：(1) 规划：从全局角度定义调查的整体结构，指定每个部分、子部分和段落要处理的内容；(2) 检索：基于规划器生成的大纲生成适当的检索关键词，并查询知识库以获取相关文献；(3) 撰写：综合检索到的信息以生成连贯的部分级内容，迭代进行直到整个调查完成。

items.en: To augment the capabilities of \modelname-8B for this task, we curate and process a large corpus of expert-authored survey papers to construct a high-quality training dataset. Concurrently, we compile an extensive collection of research papers to build a retrieval database. We further introduce a multi-stage training pipeline comprising: supervised fine-tuning, section-level reinforcement learning, and survey-level reinforcement learning. By combining the efficiency of a compact model with a rigorous training methodology, \modelname-Survey delivers performance on par with, and in some cases exceeding, that of large-scale LLMs, while remaining accessible and cost-efficient.
items.zh: 为了增强 \modelname-8B 在此任务上的能力，我们整理并处理了大量专家撰写的调查论文语料库，以构建高质量的训练数据集。同时，我们汇编了广泛的研究论文集合以构建检索数据库。我们进一步引入了多阶段训练流程，包括：监督微调、章节级强化学习和调查级强化学习。通过将紧凑模型的效率与严格的训练方法相结合，\modelname-Survey 提供了与大规模LLM相当甚至在某些情况下超越的性能，同时保持可访问性和成本效益。

items.en: As previously outlined, the survey generation pipeline involves several key stages, including planning, iterative retrieval, and content generation, which necessitate training data covering each of these stages comprehensively. To improve the survey generation capabilities of \modelname, we prioritized constructing high-quality datasets derived primarily from academic surveys, ensuring robust training outcomes. Specifically, we collected approximately 2.71 million paper abstracts from Kaggle777https://www.kaggle.com/api/v1/datasets/download/Cornell-University/arxiv as foundational data. Subsequently, we built an efficient retrieval index using MiniCPM-Embedding-Light888https://huggingface.co/openbmb/MiniCPM-Embedding-Light in conjunction with Faiss999https://github.com/facebookresearch/faiss.
items.zh: 如前所述，调查生成流程涉及几个关键阶段，包括规划、迭代检索和内容生成，这需要涵盖每个阶段的训练数据。为了提高 \modelname 的调查生成能力，我们优先构建主要来自学术调查的高质量数据集，确保稳健的训练结果。具体来说，我们从Kaggle777https://www.kaggle.com/api/v1/datasets/download/Cornell-University/arxiv 收集了约271万篇论文摘要作为基础数据。随后，我们使用 MiniCPM-Embedding-Light888https://huggingface.co/openbmb/MiniCPM-Embedding-Light 结合 Faiss999https://github.com/facebookresearch/faiss 构建了高效的检索索引。

items.en: To ensure the usability and quality of the data, raw data underwent rigorous preprocessing steps before constructing the training dataset. These steps included filtering out multimodal elements, such as tables and images, removing references not indexed in the database, and standardizing data formats. It is important to note that, beyond simple rule-based methods, we significantly utilized Large Language Models (LLMs) to rewrite and refine the raw data, thereby enhancing its consistency and relevance. Additionally, adhering to the survey generation framework proposed by Wang et al. (2025a), we synthesized three distinct types of data—queries, plans, and retrieval keywords—from the preprocessed data.
